title: openbindings.operation-graph validation fixture file
description: Well-formedness fixtures keyed to the stable rule identifiers in the openbindings.operation-graph spec: graph validation rules (OG-V-##), source rules (OG-D-##), and the validation- and version-shaped tool rules (OG-T-##). Each rule block carries `schemaEnforced`, declaring whether the op-graph JSON Schema alone is sufficient to catch violations of that rule; a runner uses it to decide whether to assert schema rejection on the negative cases. Graph-shaped tests carry `graph`; document-shaped tests (the OG-D source rules, which bind OBI content rather than graph definitions) carry `document` instead — an OBI document embedding an operation-graph source/binding.

rule.description: The stable rule identifier from the format spec: a validation rule (OG-V-##) from its Validation rules section, or a source rule (OG-D-##) / tool rule (OG-T-##) from its Conformance section.

schemaEnforced.description: True if the op-graph JSON Schema alone rejects every violation of this rule; false if catching it requires a structural validator beyond JSON Schema (reachability, cycle analysis, cross-references), or if the rule is document-shaped or tool-shaped (OG-D/OG-T blocks always declare false: the op-graph schema does not judge OBI documents or tool behavior).

graph.description: An operation graph definition, for graph-shaped rules. valid:true graphs MUST validate against the op-graph JSON Schema (except OG-T-02 refusal-gated acceptance tests skipped by a version gate); valid:false graphs for schemaEnforced rules MUST be rejected by it.

document.description: An OBI document embedding an operation-graph source and binding, for document-shaped rules (OG-D-##). The named rule is judged against the document's operation-graph sources and bindings; documents are otherwise core-valid so only the named rule discriminates.

valid.description: Whether the graph (or document) satisfies the named rule. For OG-T-02, whether a tool supporting the 0.2.x line accepts (true) or refuses (false) the graph's declared version.

operations.description: For OG-V-11 tests only: the operation keys the containing OBI declares. The runner resolves the `operation` field of every operation and each node against this set.
